title: Roti (food)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the grain|[[Roti|the star]]}}
'''Roti''' was a protein-rich [[Grain/Legends|grain]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serat]]. It was the staple of the [[Seratian]] diet. As the Seratian population expanded, it displaced other native animal life, notably the forest [[tymp]]. Over the decades and centuries, a new sub-species evolved, known as the [[urban tymp]]. Unlike wild forest tymps, urban tymps were able to digest roti and scavenged farms and urban areas. In response, the Seratians began guarding roti in [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] silos.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
